nodes.label: GVRAT 2026 Logo — official brand mark for the Great Virtual Race Across Tennessee 2026 event. Features a vulture (buzzard) mascot perched atop bold red 'GVRAT' text with blue '2026' year beneath; teal/green drop-shadow accents; white background. The vulture is a key race character ('Buzzard') that chases virtual runners. Red/blue/teal color palette evokes patriotic American identity. Used as primary site favicon and public-facing brand asset.
nodes.norm_label: gvrat 2026 logo — official brand mark for the great virtual race across tennessee 2026 event. features a vulture (buzzard) mascot perched atop bold red 'gvrat' text with blue '2026' year beneath; teal/green drop-shadow accents; white background. the vulture is a key race character ('buzzard') that chases virtual runners. red/blue/teal color palette evokes patriotic american identity. used as primary site favicon and public-facing brand asset.

nodes.label: GVRAT 2026 Favicon - Brand logo featuring a California condor/vulture mascot perched upper-left, bold red 'GVRAT' text with teal shadow/outline, bold blue '2026' text below, white background, square format PNG used as site favicon and brand identity icon
nodes.norm_label: gvrat 2026 favicon - brand logo featuring a california condor/vulture mascot perched upper-left, bold red 'gvrat' text with teal shadow/outline, bold blue '2026' text below, white background, square format png used as site favicon and brand identity icon

nodes.label: Topographic USA map background image — dark navy base with gold/amber contour lines showing US state boundaries and terrain elevation, used as hero section background to establish geographic/athletic mood
nodes.norm_label: topographic usa map background image — dark navy base with gold/amber contour lines showing us state boundaries and terrain elevation, used as hero section background to establish geographic/athletic mood

nodes.label: GVRAT 2026 Logo (Transparent Background)
nodes.description: Official brand logo for the GVRAT (Great Virtual Race Across Tennessee) 2026 event. Features a vulture/buzzard mascot perched atop bold stylized text reading 'GVRAT' in red with teal/green drop shadow, and '2026' in blue with teal/green drop shadow. The transparent PNG background variant enables overlay on any colored surface — hero sections, dark backgrounds, cards — without a white box. Brand colors: red (#E52222 approx), blue (#1A3EC8 approx), teal/green outline (#2D9E7A approx). Typography is a rounded, playful bold font. The buzzard mascot connects to the in-race virtual competitor 'Buzzard' pacesetter character.

nodes.norm_label: globe svg icon (16x16 world/geographic icon, gray fill #666, used in public assets)
